results.name: etali (phyrexian)
results.description: Etali, compleated.

results.name: etb-untapper
results.description: Cards that make things enter the battlefield untapped.

results.name: etched host
results.description: The black phyrexian invasion forces

results.name: eternal
results.description: Lazotep-encrusted zombies, created for Nicol Bolas on Amonkhet.

results.name: ethereal armor
results.description: Buffs based on the number of enchantments or Auras you control/in play. See also [Uril ability](uril-ability). For the artifact version, see [cranial plating](cranial-plating).

results.name: etherium
results.description: Aether-Infused alloy native to the Alara shard of Esper.

results.name: eumidian
results.description: A species of sapient insect-folk that have been found in both Dominaria and The Edge

results.name: evasion
results.description: Creatures that are harder to block through keywords (flying, menace) or other means.

results.name: evendo
results.description: One of Sothera's second twin planets, an icy world terraformed by Eumidians.

results.name: even/odd matters
results.description: Cards that care about things being even or odd. (Zero is Even)

results.name: exalted
results.description: Creatures attacking alone get +N/+N

results.name: exchange dice roll
results.description: Cards that let you exchange a dice roll for a number they have.

results.name: exhaust
results.description: Abilities that you can only activate once.

results.name: exile on resolution
results.description: Cards that exile themselves once they've finished all their effects. Commonly seen on extra turn cards.

results.name: exile-self
results.description: Cards which exile themselves (from the battlefield, from the graveyard, from your hand, etc.)

results.name: exile-self-dfc-transform
results.description: DFCs that exile themselves as part of their transformation.

results.name: exile with tax
results.description: Exile something, but let them pay to get it back.

results.name: expansion sweeper
results.description: You know how sets sometimes have broken cards? What if you could just delete that set from the game? A mechanism Wizards tried briefly and very firmly deprecated.

results.name: expansion symbol
results.description: Art depicting expansion symbols.

results.name: expertise
results.description: Effects that allow you to cast a card with a given mana value or less from your hand without paying its mana cost, usually in association with another effect.

results.name: exploding with light
results.description: sometimes this just happens and you're gonna explode now.

results.name: explore-like
results.description: Look at the top card, then you may draw it. If you don't, you may put it away.

results.name: exponential
results.description: Effects that involve some amount of exponential growth. This can be an exponential value, or a token creation effect that would be exponential if allowed to progress unhindered. See [quadratic](quadratic) for a different, but similar kind of effect.

results.name: external ip
results.description: Art set in distinct universes outside any Magic multiverse.

results.name: external prop
results.description: Cards that involve external props, whether objects or body parts, other than the standard tokens.

results.name: extract
results.description: Exile cards from a library. They're just gone now.

results.name: extra draft
results.description: Draft additional cards outside the normal bounds of drafting.

results.name: extra land
results.description: Effects that allow you to put additional lands from your hand, top of the library, or graveyard onto the battlefield outside of your normal once-per-turn land play. For effects that let you search your library for cards, refer to [tutor land](/tags/card/tutor-land).

results.name: extra untap
results.description: Cards that give you a way to untap things en masse, either with a new untap step or by an ability that untaps multiple things

results.name: extra wings
results.description: Why have just two wings when you can have more?

results.name: exultation
results.description: Legion of Dusk ritual wherein the lower half of a vampire is transformed into an inky black vapor, allowing them to float through the air

results.name: eye
results.description: Tags describing eyes. See also [eyes covered](/tags/artwork/eyes-covered) and [eyepatch](/tags/artwork/eyepatch). For the creature, see [eye (creature)](/tags/artwork/eye-creature).

results.name: eyeball
results.description: Art featuring or focusing on eyeballs, primarily not in someone's head where they belong.

results.name: eye colors
results.description: Tags describing eye colors, including all-white or all-black eyes.

results.name: eye (creature)
results.description: Living, floating eyes. For the Dungeons and Dragons creature, see [beholder](beholder). For eyes in general, see [eye](eye).

results.name: eye (focus)
results.description: Compositions prominently focused on someone's eyes, sometimes disembodied and watching omenously.

results.name: eye of doom
results.description: Mirrodin's blue sun.

results.name: eyes closed
results.description: Both eyes closed. See also [wink](/tags/artwork/wink).
